canonical_definition: A collection of 18 downstream tasks for evaluating DNA foundation models, covering histone marker prediction, regulatory annotation, and splice site prediction.

definitions.text: A collection of 18 downstream tasks for evaluating DNA foundation models, covering histone marker prediction, regulatory annotation, and splice site prediction.
definitions.paper: Revisiting Convolution Architecture in the Realm of DNA Foundation Models

definitions.text: A collection of 18 datasets from five studies used for benchmarking models on genomic classification tasks like identifying histone markers, regulatory elements, and splice sites.

relationships.evidence: To evaluate the learned representations, we fine-tuned our MLM-pretrained, short-context DNA-xLSTM models ... while the DNA-xLSTM-2M model was fine-tuned on the Nucleotide Transformers Tasks (Dalla-Torre et al., 2024) (Section 4.1)
